script:
set +e
python3 <<'PYEOF' 2>&1
import json
from datetime import datetime, timedelta, timezone
from collections import Counter

ACT='/home/azureuser/.mskai-bot/activities.jsonl'
OUT='/home/azureuser/.mskai-bot/outbound.jsonl'
PDT = timezone(timedelta(hours=-7))

inbound = []
for line in open(ACT, errors='replace'):
    try:
        a = json.loads(line); b = json.loads(a.get('body','{}'))
        ts = a.get('ts')
        cid = (b.get('conversation') or {}).get('id','')
        text = (b.get('text','') or '')[:50]
        inbound.append((datetime.fromisoformat(ts), cid, text))
    except Exception: pass

outbound = []
for line in open(OUT, errors='replace'):
    try:
        o = json.loads(line)
        ts = o.get('ts'); cid = o.get('chat_id',''); text = (o.get('text','') or '')[:50]
        # Outbound ts has no tz; assume PDT, convert to UTC
        dt = datetime.fromisoformat(ts).replace(tzinfo=PDT).astimezone(timezone.utc)
        outbound.append((dt, cid, text))
    except Exception: pass

print(f'inbound total: {len(inbound)}; outbound total: {len(outbound)}')
in_cids = Counter(c for _,c,_ in inbound)
out_cids = Counter(c for _,c,_ in outbound)
print(f'unique inbound chats: {len(in_cids)}; unique outbound chats: {len(out_cids)}')
print(f'inbound a:* count: {sum(v for c,v in in_cids.items() if c.startswith("a:"))}')
print(f'outbound a:* count: {sum(v for c,v in out_cids.items() if c.startswith("a:"))}')
print(f'inbound 19:* count: {sum(v for c,v in in_cids.items() if c.startswith("19:"))}')
print(f'outbound 19:* count: {sum(v for c,v in out_cids.items() if c.startswith("19:"))}')

# Chats that received outbound but never sent inbound
orphan_out = [(c,v) for c,v in out_cids.items() if c not in in_cids]
print(f'\norphan outbound chats (got reply, no inbound on record): {len(orphan_out)}')
for c,v in orphan_out[:10]:
    print(f'  {c[:50]} count={v}')

# For each outbound, find nearest prior inbound from SAME chat within 30 min.
# If none, flag — possible misroute or proactive post.
misroute_candidates = []
proactive = 0
matched = 0
for odt, ocid, otxt in outbound:
    same_chat_prior = [it for it,ic,_ in inbound if ic==ocid and (odt-it).total_seconds()>0 and (odt-it).total_seconds()<=1800]
    if same_chat_prior:
        matched += 1
    else:
        # Find nearest prior inbound of any chat within 60s — could indicate misroute
        any_prior = [(it,ic,itxt) for it,ic,itxt in inbound if 0 < (odt-it).total_seconds() <= 60]
        if any_prior:
            any_prior.sort(key=lambda x: -x[0].timestamp())
            nearest = any_prior[0]
            misroute_candidates.append((odt, ocid, otxt, nearest[1], nearest[2], (odt-nearest[0]).total_seconds()))
        else:
            proactive += 1

print(f'\nmatched (outbound has same-chat inbound within 30 min): {matched}')
print(f'proactive (no inbound within 60s and no same-chat inbound within 30 min): {proactive}')
print(f'misroute candidates (no same-chat inbound BUT another-chat inbound within 60s): {len(misroute_candidates)}')
for odt, ocid, otxt, icid, itxt, delta in misroute_candidates[:25]:
    print(f'  {odt.isoformat()} out_to={ocid[:40]} in_from={icid[:40]} delta={delta:.0f}s in_txt={itxt!r} out_txt={otxt!r}')
PYEOF
echo '===END==='
